features: Containing 100% Natural Tea Tree, Thyme, Lavender, Bergamot, Lemongrass and Cinnamon Essential Oil. The six most naturally poweful antiviral and antibacterial essential oils.

A unique blend of essential oils with powerful antiviral and antibacterial properties providing a natural and effective way to support health and hygiene. Combining the purifying strength of tea tree oil, the robust antibacterial qualities of thyme, and the potency of bergamot creates a powerhouse mix for combating germs. Adding cinnamon enhances the blend with its warm, spicy antimicrobial action, while lemongrass provides a citrusy freshness that complements its cleansing properties. Lavender not only soothes but also contributes antibacterial benefits. All combining in offering a natural shield against harmful microbes while filling the air with a refreshing and invigorating aroma.

For steam inhalation, a few drops of our antiviral essential oil in hot water can help clear the sinuses and promote respiratory health. In a spray it will refresh a room or linen with delightful aroma. Inhaling directly or using a diffuser will uplift the mood and ease stress. A nebulizer will providing a more concentrated therapeutic experience. For a soothing bath, adding our oil blend can relax muscles, calm the mind, and nourish the skin. Each method unlocks the additional natural benefits of our antiviral essential oil blend, promoting relaxation, focus, and invigoration. Our economical 30ml bottle will last and last..

Our essential oil blend brings the beautiful aroma of the natural botanicals of tea tree, thyme, lavender, bergamot, lemongrass, and cinnamon creates a sensory symphony that soothes and invigorates. Tea tree exudes a clean, earthy freshness, while thyme offers a subtle herbaceous warmth. Lavender enchants with its calming floral sweetness, blending effortlessly with the bright citrusy zest of bergamot. Lemongrass adds a crisp, lemony vibrance that feels uplifting, complemented by the comforting spice and gentle warmth of cinnamon. Together, these scents form a harmonious blend that not only delights the senses but also evokes feelings of relaxation, rejuvenation, and connection to nature.

The essential oils in our blend are known for their potent virus and bacteria killing properties, making them valuable for cleaning, disinfecting, and supporting health. These natural substances work by disrupting the cellular structure of bacteria and interfering with the replication mechanisms of viruses, offering a natural, effective way to reduce pathogens in the environment or on surfaces.
description: Product Description Natural Antiviral and Antibacterial Remedy Our beautifully smelling oil blend contains the most effective antiviral essential oils. They also all have powerful antibacterial properties. 100% natural Lemongrass, Tea Tree, Lavender, Bergamot, Cinnamon and Thyme essential oil. Thyme Essential Oil Thyme has strong properties that kill off viruses and bacteria and should be taken at first signs of a cold or illness. Thyme contains antiviral, antiseptic, antibacterial, carminative, diaphoretic, and expectorant properties which supports healing throughout the body. Cinnamon Essential Oil There is increasing evidence that cinnamon can kills viruses. Studies have found cinnamon is effective in deactivating viruses in select organisms. Tea Tree Essential Oil Tea tree oil has recently emerged as an effective antimicrobial agent active against a wide range of organisms. Tea Tree can also be used as a natural disinfectant, use it to kill germs on surfaces and in the air. Lemongrass Essential Oil Lemongrass has strong anti-fungal, antibacterial and antiviral qualities. Lemongrass oil has also been shown to possess antifungal activity against yeasts, moulds, and dermatophytes, as well as antiviral activity against HSV-1. Bergamot Essential Oil Bergamot essential oil is a powerful bactericide, which it is advisable to use by inhalation in the event of bacterial infection. Bergamot is also considered a natural remedy, aid as a disinfectant and to be antiviral. Lavender Essential Oil For centuries lavender has been called the ‘Mother of all Essential Oils‘ due to its antibacterial, anti-fungal, antioxidant, anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties. There is mention of Lavender being used for its healing properties in ancient Egyptian literature. Essential Oils Blended For Their Antiviral Properties Steam - Add oil to your diffuser or oil burner as per the operating instructions or add 2 to 3 drops of oil to hot water to inhale. Smell - Add 2 to 3 drops of oil onto a clean tissue or handkerchief. Bath - Add 6 to 8 drops of oil to the running water. Spray - Dilute 4 or 5 drop with water and use with a spray bottle. Our oil can also be used in candle making should you choose. Product Information General - Our beautifully smelling oil blend contains the most effective antiviral essential oils. They also all have powerful antibacterial properties. Ingredients - 100% natural Lemongrass, Tea Tree, Lavender, Bergamot, Cinnamon and Thyme essential oil. Storage - Store away from children and pets. Use within two years of first opening. Caution - For external use only. Avoid contact with the skin and eyes. Do not consume. If you are pregnant, nursing or taking any medication consult your doctor before use. Effective and 100% Natural Defence Against Germs and Bugs Essential oils have long been celebrated for their natural therapeutic properties, and a blend containing Tea Tree, Thyme, Lavender, Bergamot, Lemongrass, and Cinnamon essential oils stands out as a powerhouse of antiviral and antibacterial benefits. These six essential oils, each sourced from nature’s finest botanicals, are known for their potent bioactive compounds that help combat harmful microbes, reduce infections, and support overall well-being. When used individually or in combination, they provide a versatile and effective solution for promoting natural health and cleanliness without relying on synthetic chemicals. Tea Tree essential oil, derived from the leaves of Melaleuca alternifolia , is widely recognized for its powerful antimicrobial properties. It effectively combats bacteria, viruses, and fungi, making it a popular ingredient in skincare, cleaning products, and health remedies. Thyme oil, extracted from the herb Thymus vulgaris , contains thymol and carvacrol, which are highly effective against various pathogens. Together, these oils create a potent synergy to fight off infections while also soothing and rejuvenating the body. Lavender, Bergamot, and Lemongrass essential oils add further strength to this blend. Lavender oil, with its calming scent, is known not only for its antibacterial properties but also for its ability to promote relaxation and healing. Bergamot, a citrus-derived oil, offers antiseptic qualities while uplifting the mood with its fresh aroma. Lemongrass, with its earthy and lemony fragrance, provides strong antimicrobial benefits, making it an excellent choice for purifying the air and surfaces. These oils also enhance the blend’s versatility by combining physical protection with mental well-being. Finally, Cinnamon essential oil stands out as one of the most potent antibacterial and antiviral oils, thanks to its high concentration of cinnamaldehyde. It effectively fights harmful microbes while adding a warm and invigorating aroma to the blend. When combined with the other five oils, cinnamon amplifies their protective properties, creating a natural solution that is both safe and effective for boosting immunity, cleansing the environment, and supporting holistic health. Together, these six essential oils form a comprehensive and natural defence against pathogens while promoting overall balance and wellness.
